topic: My Spotify plays a podcast every night at three AM that does not exist on Spotify
title: My Spotify Plays a Podcast Every Night at 3 AM That Does Not Exist on Spotify | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My Spotify plays a podcast every night at three AM. The podcast does not exist on Spotify.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a Spotify podcast playing at three AM, dim bedside light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Pro account. Three years. Same library. Same playlists.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a Spotify library interface on a smartphone screen, multiple playlists visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I leave my phone charging by the bed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone face up on a bedside table connected to a charging cable, dim moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: First time was a Tuesday in February. Audio woke me up.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a bedside alarm clock showing three oh two AM in red numerals, dim ambient bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Voice was male. Slow. Reading something.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen with a podcast playback interface showing an audio waveform, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked the screen. Spotify was open. A podcast titled with my home address.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a Spotify podcast title field on a phone screen displaying a residential street address, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Searched the title in Spotify's app.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a Spotify search bar on a smartphone screen with an address entered, no results visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No results. The podcast does not appear in any search.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a Spotify search results screen showing zero results for a query, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It plays from my Spotify account every night at three AM. I cannot find it in any list.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a Spotify recently played list on a phone screen with no podcast entry visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the podcast described my apartment. The dishes. The sock under my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a small apartment kitchen at night with dishes piled in the sink, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cancelled Spotify three days ago.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a Spotify cancellation confirmation screen on a phone, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The podcast still plays. From an app that is no longer installed.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone home screen at night with the Spotify app icon missing, audio waveform visible at the top of the screen, vertical 9:16 framing
